overall.description: A first-person perspective journey aboard a futuristic metro train (NCART) in Cyberpunk 2077, traveling through Night City at night. The clip shows the interior cabin with cybernetically enhanced passengers, neon-lit skyscrapers passing by the window, a transition through a dark tunnel, and arrival at an underground station.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic metro train interior at departure

events.description: train begins to accelerate from stationary position

agents.ego_description: seated on a metro bench, observing a nearby passenger with cybernetic implants

notable_agents.action: passenger with braided hair and yellow pants drinking from a bottle while holding a tablet device

entered.detail: stained-glass style window with yellow geometric patterns separating the train interior from the platform
brown padded bench seat with textured fabric
illuminated neon sign with BARGHEST text visible through the window
yellow vertical grab pole for standing passengers

segments.scene_description: The scene opens inside a futuristic metro train with cyberpunk aesthetic. A passenger with distinctive braided hair sits on a brown bench to the right, drinking from a bottle. Yellow geometric patterns adorn the windows, and neon signs are visible outside. The train begins to accelerate, transitioning from stationary to movement.

scene_state.functional_zone: metro train traveling through downtown neon district

events.description: train exits station into open city view with towering skyscrapers and neon advertisements
flying vehicles pass by the window at high altitude between buildings

agents.ego_description: seated and observing the neon-lit cityscape passing by the window at high speed

notable_agents.action: passenger continues drinking from bottle while looking at tablet

entered.detail: massive skyscraper with illuminated NC logo and multiple neon billboards
futuristic aircraft flying past the window between buildings
collection of bright advertisements including 31.1% APR and BARGHEST promos

segments.scene_description: The train speeds through the heart of a cyberpunk metropolis, with massive skyscrapers covered in neon advertisements passing by the window. The NC Tower dominates the skyline, and flying vehicles navigate between buildings. The interior remains dimly lit with the passenger still seated, while the exterior flashes with vibrant neon colors.

scene_state.functional_zone: metro train traveling through underground tunnel

events.description: train enters dark tunnel, exterior visibility drops to near zero with only occasional lights visible
view outside becomes completely obscured by dark tunnel walls

agents.ego_description: continuing journey through the dark tunnel section with minimal exterior visibility

entered.detail: dark concrete tunnel walls passing by the window with occasional lighting fixtures

segments.scene_description: The train enters a dark underground tunnel, cutting off the view of the city. The exterior becomes pitch black with only the occasional tunnel light streaking by. The interior artificial lighting becomes the primary illumination, casting reflections on the windows. The train maintains high speed through the enclosed concrete corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: metro train arriving at underground station platform

events.description: train begins to decelerate as it approaches the station platform
camera pans to the right to show the opposite side of the train cabin and approaching platform

agents.ego_description: looking around the cabin as the train slows to a stop, observing other passengers on the opposite side

notable_agents.action: passenger in yellow jacket sitting across the aisle looking at device

entered.detail: illuminated train platform visible through the opposite window with structural columns
glass doors with metal frames separating train compartments
red illuminated LED display showing station information above the doors

segments.scene_description: The train decelerates as it arrives at an underground station. The camera pans to reveal the opposite side of the cabin, showing additional passengers seated across the aisle. Through the far window, the station platform becomes visible with its artificial lighting. The train comes to a stop, with digital displays and glass doors now prominent in the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective inside a futuristic metro train as it travels from a neon-lit metropolis into a dark underground station. It begins with the train accelerating away from a stop, passing a passenger with braided hair seated on a brown bench while yellow geometric patterns adorn the windows. As the train gains speed, the view shifts to a blur of massive skyscrapers and flying vehicles, with the NC Tower dominating a skyline of vibrant neon advertisements. The scene then plunges into a pitch-black underground tunnel, where the city lights vanish and are replaced by streaking tunnel lamps and artificial interior reflections on the glass. Finally, the train decelerates as it enters a station, with the camera panning across the cabin to reveal other passengers before coming to a complete stop beside a lit platform and digital displays.
